_doc: Canonical address pack per network. Mainnet block is intentionally empty until the production deployment lands; the testnet entries are the current reference deployment used by the live demo apps. Each entry lists the implementation address (for upgradeable contracts) alongside the proxy, so exchange-side monitoring can subscribe to both. Verification status is the latest known state on the named explorer; re-check before submitting to a CEX.
ownerContact: TBA — populated alongside the production deployment.

IdentityGate._note: Multi-CA aggregator. Owner can add / remove zk-X509 IdentityRegistry instances.

AuthorizeVerifier._note: One Groth16 verifier per tier (16/64/128 max-claims-per-side). All registered on PrivateSettlement.authorizeVerifierByTier.

BatchAuthorizeVerifier._note: Optional batched Groth16 verifier; PrivateSettlement falls back to per-side verification when this isn't set.

BatchExecutor._note: ERC-7579 + EIP-7702 batch executor for the deposit one-shot flow (wrap + approve + deposit). Not stealth-related — the previous StealthTransferAccount delegate was removed in PR #668.

history: 2026-05-12 (PR #678) — initial schema. Mainnet block reserved; testnet placeholders carry the contract names and roles, addresses fill in as the upgrade-track PRs land their final deployments.
Prior context: the EIP-7702 stealth delegate (StealthTransferAccount.sol) and its zk-relayer transfer-7702 route were removed in PR #668. They are intentionally absent from this address pack.
